description: Ancient folk art characterized by intricate patterns and mythological themes, primarily created by women

paintings.title: Fertility and Abundance
paintings.description: Traditional fertility symbols with geometric patterns and natural elements

paintings.title: Fish and Water Motifs
paintings.description: Auspicious fish patterns with water-inspired geometric designs

paintings.title: Ramayan Epic Scene
paintings.description: Detailed scene from Ramayana epic with intricate character and landscape details
